Info

Defines abstract class ITemplateDir with method(s). Interface for the project template directory mechanism.

class ats_utilities.config_setup.itemplate_dir.ITemplateDir[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class ITemplateDir with method(s). Interface for the project template directory mechanism.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
template_dir - Property methods for set/get operations.
not_none - Checks if project template directory is not None.
__str__ - Returns the ATS project template directory as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract not_none() → bool[source]¶

Checks if project template directory is not None.

Returns:

True (success) | False (fail)

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract property template_dir: str | None¶

Property method for getting template dir.

Returns:

Formatted template dir in string format | None

Return type:

<Optional[str]>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError
